view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied as evidenced by the booking details.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied as evidenced by the booking details.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for fixed-duration appointments, specifically 50 minutes, as indicated by the confirmed bookings in the prior step evidence. The booking details show that both customers have booked appointments with a fixed duration of 50 minutes, as reflected in the 'pricingSnapshot' of the booking evidence. This directly supports the requirement's coverage, confirming that the system allows for fixed-duration appointments as specified.
